justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified the user's preferred date and time, offering relevant slots around 4 PM on June 13th.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully offered two relevant time slots when the user specified 'around 4 PM', allowing the user to choose their preferred option.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in a minimal number of turns without redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's intent and successfully booking the appointment.
